user.title: Farmfoods Vouchers
user.description:
Paste the full voucher URL from your Farmfoods email. It looks like:
https://www.farmfoods.co.uk/Vouchers?campaign_id=...&id=...&email_address=...

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Farmfoods voucher page. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_url: The URL is missing required parameters or does not point to a valid Farmfoods voucher page.

abort.already_configured: This Farmfoods account is already configured.
